content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Strong global risk-on with US markets up sharply (S&P +1.46%, Nasdaq +2.02%); domestic earnings season delivering strong prints across multiple sectors (FMCG, IT, chemicals, defense, financials). Existing book is well-positioned with most holdings showing meaningful unrealized gains on Q4 result-day moves. Priority is locking in gains via trailing SLs, not adding new exposure given heavy already-deployed book.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 984, CMP 1056.70, +7.4% unrealized. Current SL 1035 is already above entry (locking ~5% gain). CMP 1056.70 vs SL 1035 = ~2.1% gap, healthy buffer above 1% trail floor. Q4 print constructive, RSI not overbought on weekly. HOLD existing SL — already trailed adequately, no change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 125.10, CMP 124.12, -0.8%. Hedge position; SL 121 (-3.3% from entry) intact. Geopolitical de-escalation dampens momentum but USD weakness and structural demand keep floor. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1700, CMP 1757.10, +3.4% unrealized. Current SL 1730 is already at +1.8% above entry (gain locked). CMP-SL gap = 1.5%, just above 1% floor. Stock hit fresh 52-week high today. Holding existing SL — no further tightening to give it room above pivot."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4500.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 4575, CMP 4630.40, +1.2%. Current SL is at entry (4575). CMP-SL gap only 1.2%, dangerously close to 1% floor. Loosening SL to 4500 would VIOLATE the tighten-only rule — REJECT this approach. Keep SL at 4575 (breakeven)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 6900, CMP 7049, +2.2%. SL 6960 already above entry (locking ~0.9% gain). CMP-SL gap = 1.3%, just above floor. Q4 was record (+124% PAT), near 52w high 7200. Hold existing SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 830.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 838, CMP 845.20, +0.9%. SL 830 (~1% below entry). CMP-SL gap = 1.8%, healthy. Low-volume breakout (0.4x), so don't tighten further. HOLD existing SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 369, CMP 368.70, flat. Stock made fresh ATH 372.5 today. SL 363 (-1.6%), CMP-SL gap = 1.5%, adequate. Q4 strong (+30% PAT). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 820, CMP 822.55, +0.3%. Q4 PAT +18%, fresh ATH 843.15 today, MOFSL TP 950. SL 810 (-1.2%), CMP-SL gap 1.5%. Hold and let breakout develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1259, CMP 1279.10, +1.6%. SL at entry (1259), CMP-SL gap = 1.6%. Q4 multifold PAT jump, IT sector outperformer. Hold to allow follow-through above 1295."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 3025, CMP 3034, +0.3%. SL 2990 (-1.2%), CMP-SL gap = 1.5%. Defense cluster overheated (HAL+GRSE both held). Q4 was strong (+24% PAT, +61% EBITDA). Hold but do not add to defense cluster."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 806, CMP 807.30, flat. Gapped +10.46% then faded but holding. SL 795 (-1.4%), CMP-SL gap = 1.5%. Q4 PAT +11%, EBITDA ATH. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already 5% above entry locking gains; gap to CMP 2.1% — adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL intact, gold thesis unbroken."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry; 1.5% buffer to CMP — at noise floor, don't tighten further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; defense cluster hot but valuation stretched, hold tight."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry, 1.3% buffer to CMP — hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 830.00,
      "reasoning": "Low-volume breakout, give it room; SL ~1.8% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "reasoning": "ATH today, Q4 strong, healthy SL gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 810.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh ATH, FMCG breakout, MOFSL TP 950 implies room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1259.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry, IT outperformer, allow follow-through."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "reasoning": "Defense cluster already 2 names; hold but no add."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 795.00,
      "reasoning": "Gap held; Q4 EBITDA ATH; SL 1.5% below CMP."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LAURUSLABS at fresh ATH on +148% FY26 PAT — interesting but already held pharma exposure absent; not adding today given full book. SRF +6.85% on Q4 beat, extension play but NAVINFLUOR already covers chemicals. HINDPETRO BEARISH research (Q4 May 13 binary, lowest GRM among OMCs) — AVOID. VEDL ex-demerger volatility — AVOID until new entities list. BIOCON, DABUR, BSE, BHARATFORG, M&M — pass today, capital constrained. HFCL pending OPEN order from prior session at 133.50 — let it expire/cancel context (no symbol data shown).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily deployed across 11 CNC positions on Q4-result-day breakouts. Cumulative experiment P&L is -53.72% — major drawdown context demands DEFENSE-FIRST mode. Today's job is monitoring, not adding. All holdings are flat to modestly green on entry day; none warrant aggressive trailing yet (CMP-SL gaps near 1-2% floor). NO new entries today: (1) defense cluster already 2 names (HAL+GRSE), (2) financial cluster 3 names (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS), (3) capital constrained with 11 positions. Will reassess tomorrow once intraday gains stabilize and tighter trails become viable above the 1% noise floor. Stale OPEN HFCL BUY @133.50 from 1766m ago should be reviewed/cancelled — but no data on HFCL provided this tick."
}
